canonical_definition: A comprehensive benchmark framework designed to evaluate the capability of LLMs in task automation across three stages: task decomposition, tool selection, and parameter prediction.
papers: Can Graph Learning Improve Planning in LLM-based Agents?
TaskBench: Benchmarking Large Language Models for Task Automation
